title: Premium E-Commerce Store
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with React frontend and Node.js backend. Features JWT authentication, database-backed cart and wishlist, product filtering, dark mode, and smooth Framer Motion animations.

title: SUST GPA Calculator
description: GPA and grade tracker built specifically for SUST Mathematics students. Track courses, credits and grades semester by semester with automatic cumulative GPA calculation, progression charts, and Google cloud sync.

title: AI Wealth Tracker
description: AI-powered personal finance dashboard. Track expenses, visualize spending with charts, get real-time financial advice from Gemini and Groq AI, export PDF and CSV reports, with full cloud sync via Firebase.

title: InvoicePro — SaaS Invoicing
description: Full-stack invoicing SaaS for freelancers and small businesses. Create, download, and track professional invoices with PDF export, status tracking (Draft/Sent/Paid), Google OAuth, and Row Level Security via Supabase.

title: Ledger — Expense Tracker
description: Fast, mobile-friendly expense tracker with monthly budgets, daily spending charts, AI weekly summaries via Gemini, a smoking habit tracker with quit-motivation nudges, and PWA support for phone installation.

title: SAAD AI — Math Engine
description: AI-powered university-level mathematics solver built from scratch. Fine-tuned SmolLM2-1.7B on Kaggle GPU to solve calculus, algebra, real analysis, group theory and number theory with step-by-step academic explanations and LaTeX rendering.

title: Discord GamingBot
description: Advanced Discord bot for gaming communities with XP leveling, auto role rewards at milestones, rank card image generation, economy system with daily coins, leaderboards, auto-moderation, and 12+ commands.
